title: AI-Guided Depression Treatment Pathways
description: Machine learning model to predict treatment response in major depression, enabling personalised antidepressant selection.

title: Portable TMS Device for Home Use
description: Developing a portable transcranial magnetic stimulation device for treatment-resistant depression in outpatient settings.

title: Digital Mental Health Monitoring App
description: Smartphone app for continuous mood monitoring in bipolar disorder patients.

title: Ketamine Infusion Protocol Optimisation
description: Clinical protocol development for subanaesthetic ketamine in treatment-resistant depression with real-time outcome tracking.

title: VR Exposure Therapy Platform
description: Virtual reality platform for graded exposure therapy in anxiety and PTSD, integrated with clinician dashboards.

title: Youth Early Psychosis Detection Tool
description: Digital screening tool for early psychosis in adolescents, deployed across school and primary care settings.

title: Pharmacogenomic Cancer Panel
description: Clinical-grade pharmacogenomic testing panel for personalised oncology treatment selection.

title: Liquid Biopsy Early Detection Platform
description: Multi-cancer early detection platform using circulating tumour DNA analysis.

title: CAR-T Solid Tumour Platform
description: Next-generation CAR-T cell therapy platform targeting solid tumour antigens.

title: Polygenic Risk Score Clinical Portal
description: Patient-facing portal delivering polygenic risk scores for cardiovascular and metabolic disease prevention.

title: Tumour Organoid Drug Screening
description: Patient-derived organoid platform for testing chemotherapy response before treatment begins.

title: Wearable Cardiac Biomarker Sensor
description: Implantable micro-sensor for continuous troponin and BNP monitoring in heart failure patients.

title: Rare Disease Gene Therapy Pipeline
description: AAV-based gene therapy candidates for three rare paediatric genetic disorders.

title: Neuromuscular Patient Registry Platform
description: National registry and natural history study platform for neuromuscular disorders.

title: Newborn Metabolic Screening Expansion
description: Expanded newborn screening panel covering 50 additional rare metabolic conditions.

title: Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy Trial Network
description: Multi-site clinical trial network for novel exon-skipping therapies in Duchenne muscular dystrophy.

title: Fabry Disease Enzyme Replacement Programme
description: Long-term outcomes study of enzyme replacement therapy in Fabry disease with biomarker tracking.

title: Epilepsy Genomics Diagnostic Hub
description: Rapid whole-genome sequencing service for undiagnosed epilepsy syndromes in paediatric patients.

title: Integrated Care Coordination System
description: Digital platform connecting primary care, specialists, and community services for chronic disease management.

title: Clinical AI Decision Support Tool
description: Real-time clinical decision support using federated learning across hospital networks.

title: Hospital-at-Home Digital Pathway
description: Remote monitoring and virtual ward platform enabling acute care delivery in patients' homes.

title: Emergency Department Triage Optimiser
description: AI-powered triage system reducing wait times and improving patient flow in emergency departments.

title: Population Health Surveillance Dashboard
description: Real-time epidemiological dashboard integrating hospital, GP, and pathology data across SESLHD.

title: Nursing Workflow Automation Suite
description: Digital tools for medication administration, handover, and shift planning across ward environments.
